role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and stayed within script analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on soil color (laterite), vegetation type (scrub/savanna), and terrain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed leaf morphology (sclerophyllous, bipinnate) and biome types (Cerrado).
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the lack of regulatory infrastructure (signs, poles) and stayed within infrastructure analysis.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed image artifacts and camera generation patterns specific to Google Street View coverage.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil. The specialists provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (soil, vegetation, camera artifacts) that was effectively synthesized by the tournament judge to distinguish Brazil from the closest analogs (Senegal, Thailand).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the red soil and scrub vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described the plant structures visible.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately reported the absence of signs/poles.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the motion blur and image quality.
